summary: Visual flicker fix VERIFIED. All fixes working correctly: 1) SECTION_LABELS mapping displays correct header labels for all 8 sections, 2) Delayed skeleton loading (150ms) prevents flash on fast loads, 3) Stable content wrapper CSS prevents layout shift, 4) URL sync works without double-renders. Rapid switching (10+ times) stable. F5 refresh preserves state. Delete functionality working. Search/filter/pagination working.

bug_fix_verification.issue: Visual glitch/flicker when switching between admin sidebar sections - brief visual flash/disappearing effect
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: 1) Raw section IDs shown in header instead of proper labels, 2) Skeleton showing immediately on component mount causing flash, 3) Double-render from URL sync useEffect

section_labels.details: SECTION_LABELS mapping at line 1723-1736 in App.js provides correct header labels. getSectionLabel() function at line 1739-1740 used for header display.

delayed_skeleton.details: AdminTransfersQueue.js and AdminCardRequestsQueue.js implement 150ms delay via showSkeleton state - skeleton only shows if loading takes > 150ms

stable_content_wrapper.details: .admin-section-content CSS class at line 208-211 in App.css provides min-height to prevent layout shift

optimized_url_sync.details: URL sync only runs on browser navigation, preventing double-renders

visual_flicker_tests.test: Support Tickets to Transfers Queue switch

functional_tests.result: PASS - SUBMITTED, COMPLETED, REJECTED tabs working
PASS - PENDING, FULFILLED, REJECTED tabs working
PASS - Delete modal appears, cancel button works
PASS - Search input in Transfers Queue works
PASS - Page size selection and next/prev buttons work

stability_tests.result: PASS - No crashes, no stale data

stability_tests.test: No error toasts after rapid switching

critical_code_review_comments: SECTION_LABELS mapping correctly implemented with all section aliases (ledger/transfers, support/tickets, card_requests/card-requests)
Delayed skeleton pattern (150ms threshold) properly prevents flash on fast loads
.admin-section-content min-height CSS prevents layout shift during section switches
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual flicker/glitch bug fix verified. All 8 admin sections show correct header labels. Delayed skeleton loading (150ms) prevents flash. Rapid switching is stable. Delete, search, filter, pagination all working correctly.
